violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside microwaves and all line coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts, sides and handles on all kitchen coolers and equipment. -Clean all shelving on cook line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling in kitchen need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles in kitchen are in poor repair and need replaced.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)

Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
